title: TitanPRO™ Heavy Duty Birchwood Folding Banquet Table - 60" Round
features: One might think all commercial wood folding tables are the same but there's no match for our TitanPRO™ 60'' Heavy Duty Birchwood Folding Banquet Table.
As far as wholesale wood folding tables go, these are the cream of the crop.

The .75'' thick plywood top features 4 coats of polyurethane for an ultra sleek finish and boasts a robust and durable aluminum edging to prevent any sort of damage from dropping or clumsy stacking when in storage.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more
